title: Silicon Scars
description:
You were put into stasis just before the departure of your generation ship on its maiden voyage to colonize a distant star system.

Now, orbiting the empty planet, you must explore the ship. Piece together what happened, and escape with your life the only way you know how:

>>>Running through the bowels of the largest spacecraft humanity has ever built - and may ever build.

>>>Gunning down the alien interlopers looking to strip the ship for parts - whether you're in it or not.

>>>Reading through the ship's numerous logs to track down the fates of the colonists and crew.

Features• 21 levels.

• Terminals filled with lore and a unique science fiction story.

• A dynamic soundtrack composed by Kyle Misko.
